examples.name: Basic GET Request - Execute Saved Request
examples.description: Execute a saved request and process the response
examples.code:
' Reference the assembly
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Namespace OneStream.BusinessRule.Finance.MyRule
	Public Class MainClass
		Public Function Main(ByVal si As SessionInfo, ByVal globals As BRGlobals, ByVal api As FinanceRulesApi, ByVal args As FinanceRulesArgs) As Object
			Try
				' Get the saved request
				Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
				Dim result As HttpResult = utils.ExecuteSavedRequest(si, "GetCustomers")
				
				' Check response
				If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
					BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Success: {result.Content}")
				Else
					Throw New Exception($"Request failed: {result.StatusCode} - {result.Err}")
				End If
				
				Return Nothing
			Catch ex As Exception
				Throw ErrorHandler.LogWrite(si, New XFException(si, ex))
			End Try
		End Function
	End Class
End Namespace
tags: Requires reference to: Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager
Request must be pre-configured in RESTFAST dashboard

examples.name: GET Request with Custom Variables
examples.description: Override variables when executing a saved request
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, "GetProducts")

' Override variables
Dim customVars As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
	{"category", "electronics"},
	{"limit", "50"},
	{"page", "1"}
}

' Execute with custom variables
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute(customVars)

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Retrieved {result.Content.Length} bytes")
End If
tags: Variables use {{key}} pattern in endpoint/params/headers/body
Custom variables override default request variables

examples.name: Get DataTable with Pagination
examples.description: Retrieve all data from paginated API into DataTable
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, "GetAllOrders")

' Get all data with pagination (limit = 3 means max 3 API calls)
Dim dt As DataTable = request.GetDataTable(limit:=3)

BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Loaded {dt.Rows.Count} rows, {dt.Columns.Count} columns")

' Process the data
For Each row As DataRow In dt.Rows
	Dim orderId As String = row("OrderID").ToString()
	Dim amount As Decimal = Convert.ToDecimal(row("Amount"))
	' ... process data
Next
tags: Request must have dataKey configured (e.g., 'results->data')
Handles pagination via nextLinkKey or manual top/skip params
limit=0 means unlimited pagination (use with caution)
columnMappings automatically applied to DataTable

examples.name: Populate Custom Table Directly
examples.description: Load API data directly into OneStream custom table
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, "GetInventory")

' Override variables if needed
Dim vars As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
	{"warehouse", "WH01"},
	{"date", DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")}
}

' Populate table with data
request.PopulateTable(si, vars)

BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Custom table '{request.tableToPopulate}' populated successfully")
tags: Request must have tableToPopulate configured
Table must exist in OneStream database
columnMappings must map all target table columns
First call uses 'replace' mode, subsequent use 'merge'
Handles pagination automatically

examples.name: Manual Request Configuration
examples.description: Create and configure a request programmatically without using saved requests
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes
Imports System.Net

' Create new request
Dim request As New RESTAPIRequest()

' Configure request
request.method = "GET"
request.endpoint = "https://api.example.com/v1/data"
request.urlParams = New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
	{"page", "1"},
	{"limit", "100"}
}
request.headers = New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
	{"Accept", "application/json"},
	{"User-Agent", "OneStream/1.0"}
}
request.bodyType = "none"
request.body = Nothing

' Configure authentication
request.authCredentials = New ApiKeyAuthCredentials("YOUR_API_KEY", "header")

' Configure data retrieval
request.dataKey = "results->items"
request.nextLinkKey = "pagination->next"

' Execute
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute()

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Request successful")
End If
tags: Useful for dynamic request creation
No need for saved request in dashboard
More verbose but offers complete control

examples.name: POST Request with JSON Body
examples.description: Send JSON data to an API
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()

' Create request
Dim request As New RESTAPIRequest()
request.method = "POST"
request.endpoint = "https://api.example.com/orders"
request.headers = New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
	{"Content-Type", "application/json"},
	{"Accept", "application/json"}
}
request.bodyType = "application/json"
request.body = "{ ""customerId"": ""C123"", ""amount"": 500.00, ""currency"": ""USD"" }"

' Add Bearer token auth
request.authCredentials = New BearerTokenAuthCredentials("your_token_here")

' Execute
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute()

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.Created OrElse result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Order created: {result.Content}")
Else
	Throw New Exception($"Order creation failed: {result.StatusCode}")
End If
tags: body can be String (JSON) or Dictionary(Of String, String)
Use variables for dynamic values: {{customerId}}, {{amount}}, etc.

examples.name: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Flow
examples.description: Authenticate with OAuth 2.0 and make API requests
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

' Configure OAuth credentials
Dim oauth As New OAuthCredentials With {
	.GrantType = OAuthCredentials.GrantTypes.ClientCredentials,
	.ClientId = "your_client_id",
	.ClientSecret = "your_client_secret",
	.TokenUrl = "https://auth.example.com/oauth/token",
	.Scope = "read write"
}

' Create API request
Dim request As New RESTAPIRequest()
request.method = "GET"
request.endpoint = "https://api.example.com/protected/data"
request.authCredentials = oauth  ' OAuth will auto-refresh token if expired

' Execute request
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute()

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Authenticated request successful")
End If
tags: OAuth credentials automatically refresh expired tokens
Access token is added as Bearer token in Authorization header
Supports multiple grant types: ClientCredentials, Password, AuthorizationCode, RefreshToken

examples.name: Basic Authentication
examples.description: Use Basic Auth (username/password) for API requests
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim request As New RESTAPIRequest()
request.method = "GET"
request.endpoint = "https://api.example.com/data"

' Configure Basic Auth
request.authCredentials = New BasicAuthCredentials("username", "password")

' Execute
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute()

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Authenticated successfully")
End If
tags: Credentials are Base64 encoded automatically
Added as Authorization: Basic {encoded} header

Use for dynamic filtering based on POV or workflow

examples.name: Processing API Response in Business Rule
examples.description: Parse JSON response and process data programmatically
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes
Imports Newtonsoft.Json.Linq

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
Dim result As HttpResult = utils.ExecuteSavedRequest(si, "GetExchangeRates")

If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
	' Parse JSON response
	Dim jsonData As JObject = JObject.Parse(result.Content)
	
	' Extract specific values
	Dim rates As JObject = jsonData("rates")
	Dim eurRate As Decimal = rates("EUR").Value(Of Decimal)()
	Dim gbpRate As Decimal = rates("GBP").Value(Of Decimal)()
	
	BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"EUR Rate: {eurRate}, GBP Rate: {gbpRate}")
	
	' Use rates in calculations
	Dim amount As Decimal = 1000
	Dim convertedAmount As Decimal = amount * eurRate
	
	' Write to data buffer, etc.
End If
tags: Newtonsoft.Json.Linq available in OneStream
Use JObject for JSON parsing
Useful when you need custom processing beyond DataTable

examples.name: Error Handling and Retry Logic
examples.description: Handle API errors and implement retry logic
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

Dim maxRetries As Integer = 3
Dim retryCount As Integer = 0
Dim success As Boolean = False
Dim result As HttpResult = Nothing

Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()

While retryCount < maxRetries AndAlso Not success
	Try
		result = utils.ExecuteSavedRequest(si, "GetData")
		
		If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
			success = True
			BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Request successful")
		ElseIf result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.TooManyRequests Then
			' Rate limited - wait and retry
			System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(5000) ' Wait 5 seconds
			retryCount += 1
			BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Rate limited. Retry {retryCount}/{maxRetries}")
		Else
			Throw New Exception($"Request failed: {result.StatusCode} - {result.Err}")
		End If
	Catch ex As Exception
		retryCount += 1
		If retryCount >= maxRetries Then
			Throw ErrorHandler.LogWrite(si, New XFException(si, ex))
		End If
		System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(2000)
	End Try
End While
tags: Handle common HTTP status codes: 429 (Too Many Requests), 500 (Server Error)
Implement exponential backoff for production use
Log all retry attempts for debugging

examples.name: Merge API Data into Dimension Table
examples.description: Use custom table as staging, then merge into dimension
examples.code:
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes

' Step 1: Populate staging custom table
Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, "GetCustomers")
request.PopulateTable(si)

BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Staging table populated")

' Step 2: Read from staging table
Dim sql As String = "SELECT CustomerID, CustomerName, Region FROM CustomTable_Customers"
Dim dt As DataTable = BRApi.Database.SQLSelect(si, sql)

BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"Retrieved {dt.Rows.Count} customers from staging")

' Step 3: Process and load into dimension
For Each row As DataRow In dt.Rows
	Dim customerId As String = row("CustomerID").ToString()
	Dim customerName As String = row("CustomerName").ToString()
	Dim region As String = row("Region").ToString()
	
	' Create/update dimension member
	' ... your dimension loading logic here ...
Next

BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "Dimension updated successfully")
tags: Custom table acts as staging area
Allows data transformation before loading
Can validate data before dimension update
Use in Data Management workflow
